carrier_inpost.config.help: Configure your InPost API token and organization ID in Integration credentials. Available services: Paczkomat lockers (standard & express) and courier delivery.
carrier_inpost.description: Ship parcels via InPost lockers (Paczkomat) and courier delivery with real-time tracking.
carrier_inpost.title: InPost
carrier_inpost.demo.title: InPost Integration Demo
carrier_inpost.demo.providerFound: InPost is registered as a provider.
carrier_inpost.demo.providerNotFound: InPost provider not found in registry.
carrier_inpost.demo.section.providersDes: Verifies that InPost is registered in the shipping carrier registry.
carrier_inpost.demo.section.ratesDesc: Fetches InPost rates for a 1 kg, 20×15×10 cm parcel from Warsaw to Krakow.
carrier_inpost.demo.section.shipmentDesc: Creates a shipment using the selected rate. Requires rates to be fetched first.
carrier_inpost.demo.section.trackingDesc: Polls InPost for live tracking status and events. Requires a shipment to be created first.
carrier_inpost.demo.section.cancelDesc: Cancels the created shipment. Returns 422 if the shipment has already moved beyond cancellable status.
carrier_inpost.demo.section.webhooksDesc: InPost sends webhook events to /api/shipping-carriers/webhooks/inpost. The last received event timestamp is stored on each shipment record (lastWebhookAt). Use the InPost dashboard to configure the webhook endpoint URL.
carrier_inpost.tracking.title: InPost Tracking
carrier_inpost.tracking.noShipment: No InPost shipment found for this order.
